# Status Badges

Add these badges to your README.md to show pipeline status.

## CI/CD Status Badges

### Main CI Pipeline

```markdown
[![CI Pipeline](https://github.com/denysvitali/pictures-sync-s3/actions/workflows/ci.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/denysvitali/pictures-sync-s3/actions/workflows/ci.yml)
```

[![CI Pipeline](https://github.com/denysvitali/pictures-sync-s3/actions/workflows/ci.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/denysvitali/pictures-sync-s3/actions/workflows/ci.yml)

## Combined Badge Section

## Shield.io Custom Badges

You can create custom badges at https://shields.io/

### Example: Platform Support

```markdown
![Platform](https://img.shields.io/badge/platform-Raspberry%20Pi%204-red)
![Architecture](https://img.shields.io/badge/arch-arm64%20%7C%20armv7%20%7C%20amd64-blue)
```

![Platform](https://img.shields.io/badge/platform-Raspberry%20Pi%204-red)
![Architecture](https://img.shields.io/badge/arch-arm64%20%7C%20armv7%20%7C%20amd64-blue)

### Example: Technology Stack

```markdown
![Go](https://img.shields.io/badge/Go-1.25-00ADD8?logo=go)
![Gokrazy](https://img.shields.io/badge/Gokrazy-deployed-green?logo=linux)
![rclone](https://img.shields.io/badge/rclone-1.71-blue)
```

![Go](https://img.shields.io/badge/Go-1.25-00ADD8?logo=go)
![Gokrazy](https://img.shields.io/badge/Gokrazy-deployed-green?logo=linux)
![rclone](https://img.shields.io/badge/rclone-1.71-blue)

## README Example

Here's how to add a comprehensive status section to your README.md:

```markdown
# pictures-sync-s3

A Gokrazy-based photo backup appliance for Raspberry Pi 4.

## Status

[![CI Pipeline](https://github.com/denysvitali/pictures-sync-s3/actions/workflows/ci.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/denysvitali/pictures-sync-s3/actions/workflows/ci.yml)
[![Security Scan](https://github.com/denysvitali/pictures-sync-s3/actions/workflows/security.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/denysvitali/pictures-sync-s3/actions/workflows/security.yml)
[![CodeQL](https://github.com/denysvitali/pictures-sync-s3/actions/workflows/codeql.yml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/denysvitali/pictures-sync-s3/actions/workflows/codeql.yml)
[![Go Report Card](https://goreportcard.com/badge/github.com/denysvitali/pictures-sync-s3)](https://goreportcard.com/report/github.com/denysvitali/pictures-sync-s3)

![Go Version](https://img.shields.io/github/go-mod/go-version/denysvitali/pictures-sync-s3)
![Platform](https://img.shields.io/badge/platform-Raspberry%20Pi%204-red)
![Architecture](https://img.shields.io/badge/arch-arm64%20%7C%20armv7%20%7C%20amd64-blue)

## Features

...
```

## Notes

- Badges update automatically based on workflow status
- Some badges require external service setup (Codecov, Go Report Card)
- Badge URLs use repository owner and name - update if you fork
- Shields.io provides extensive customization options
- Consider badge placement for visual balance in README
